input.content:
================================================================================
                    PROJECT MANAGEMENT TOOL - VERSION 2.0
                              RELEASE NOTES
================================================================================

Release Date: [Current Date]
Version: 2.0.0
Status: General Availability

================================================================================
OVERVIEW
================================================================================

We are excited to announce version 2.0 of our Project Management Tool! This 
major release introduces significant enhancements to collaboration, reporting, 
and user experience. With improved performance, new automation features, and 
a redesigned interface, version 2.0 empowers teams to work more efficiently 
and deliver projects on time.

================================================================================
NEW FEATURES
================================================================================

1. ADVANCED TASK AUTOMATION
   - Automation Rules: Create custom workflows with if/then conditions to 
     automatically update tasks, assign owners, and trigger notifications
   - Template Library: Pre-built task templates for common project types to 
     accelerate project setup
   - Recurring Tasks: Schedule tasks to repeat on daily, weekly, or monthly 
     intervals with automatic dependency management

2. REAL-TIME COLLABORATION
   - Live Comments: See team members' comments and reactions in real-time 
     with presence indicators
   - Collaborative Editing: Multiple users can edit task descriptions and 
     project details simultaneously
   - Activity Feed: Unified stream showing all project activity with filters 
     and smart notifications

3. ENHANCED REPORTING & ANALYTICS
   - Custom Dashboards: Create personalized dashboards with drag-and-drop 
     widgets for key metrics
   - Advanced Reporting: Generate comprehensive reports with charts, trends, 
     and forecasting analytics
   - Export Options: Export reports to PDF, Excel, and CSV formats with 
     customizable templates
   - Burndown Charts: Track sprint progress with visual burndown and velocity 
     charts

4. PORTFOLIO MANAGEMENT
   - Multi-Project Views: Manage and visualize multiple projects in a single 
     portfolio dashboard
   - Resource Allocation: View and balance resource allocation across projects
   - Strategic Planning: Support for long-term planning with milestone tracking
   - Budget Tracking: Monitor project budgets and expenses by resource and task

5. MOBILE APP ENHANCEMENTS
   - Native iOS & Android Applications: Fully-featured mobile apps with offline 
     support for core functionality
   - Push Notifications: Customizable alerts for task assignments, comments, 
     and deadline reminders
   - Mobile Sync: Seamless synchronization of changes across all devices

6. INTEGRATIONS EXPANSION
   - Slack Integration: Receive notifications and update tasks directly from Slack
   - Microsoft Teams Support: Manage projects and receive updates within Teams
   - Calendar Integration: Sync tasks and deadlines with Google Calendar and Outlook
   - Webhook Support: Create custom integrations with third-party applications

7. SECURITY & COMPLIANCE
   - Two-Factor Authentication (2FA): Enhanced security with optional 2FA 
     for user accounts
   - Single Sign-On (SSO): SAML 2.0 and OAuth 2.0 support for enterprise 
     deployments
   - Audit Logs: Comprehensive logging of all user actions and data changes 
     for compliance
   - Data Encryption: End-to-end encryption for data in transit and at rest

================================================================================
IMPROVEMENTS
================================================================================

1. PERFORMANCE OPTIMIZATIONS
   - 40% faster page load times through optimized database queries
   - Reduced memory footprint by 25% with improved caching mechanisms
   - Improved handling of large projects with 10,000+ tasks
   - Optimized mobile app startup time

2. USER INTERFACE REDESIGN
   - Modern, responsive design that works seamlessly on all devices
   - Improved navigation with contextual shortcuts and quick actions
   - Dark mode support for reduced eye strain during extended work sessions
   - Accessibility improvements including WCAG 2.1 AA compliance

3. TASK MANAGEMENT ENHANCEMENTS
   - Bulk Operations: Update multiple tasks at once with bulk edit functionality
   - Advanced Filtering: Create and save complex filters for better task organization
   - Custom Fields: Support for unlimited custom fields with various data types
   - Dependency Management: Visual dependency chains with automatic schedule updates

4. PROJECT TEMPLATES
   - Expanded template library with 50+ industry-specific templates
   - Custom template creation and sharing within teams
   - Version control for template management
   - Quick setup wizard for new projects

5. NOTIFICATION SYSTEM
   - Smart Notifications: AI-powered notification aggregation to reduce noise
   - Customizable Notification Rules: Set preferences by task type, priority, 
     and user role
   - Email Digest: Daily or weekly digest emails with consolidated updates
   - Browser Notifications: Real-time desktop notifications for urgent updates

6. SEARCH & DISCOVERY
   - Full-text search across all tasks, comments, and attachments
   - Advanced search syntax with filters and operators
   - Search suggestions and auto-complete functionality
   - Saved searches for frequently used queries

7. DOCUMENTATION & ONBOARDING
   - Interactive in-app tutorials and guided tours
   - Comprehensive knowledge base with video tutorials
   - Context-sensitive help throughout the application
   - Improved API documentation for developers

8. DATA MANAGEMENT
   - Bulk Import: Import tasks and projects from CSV files
   - Data Export: Export project data in multiple formats
   - Improved Backup: Automated daily backups with point-in-time restore
   - Data Migration Tools: Tools to migrate from competing solutions

================================================================================
BUG FIXES
================================================================================

1. TASK MANAGEMENT FIXES
   - Fixed issue where task status changes were not propagating to dependent tasks
   - Resolved problem with custom task fields disappearing after project archive
   - Fixed filtering errors when using multiple filter criteria simultaneously
   - Corrected calculation of task completion percentage in projects with subtasks

2. USER INTERFACE FIXES
   - Fixed layout issues on smaller screens and mobile devices
   - Resolved dropdown menu positioning problems in nested views
   - Fixed inconsistent styling in dark mode across all browsers
   - Corrected date picker behavior in different time zones

3. COLLABORATION FIXES
   - Fixed real-time updates not appearing for other team members in some cases
   - Resolved conflicts when multiple users edit the same task simultaneously
   - Fixed comment notifications not being delivered for @mentions
   - Corrected permissions not updating immediately after role changes

4. REPORTING FIXES
   - Fixed missing data points in burndown charts for multi-sprint projects
   - Resolved incorrect calculations in resource utilization reports
   - Fixed exported PDF files containing corrupted images and charts
   - Corrected time tracking calculations for tasks with multiple time entries

5. INTEGRATION FIXES
   - Fixed Slack notifications not including updated task details
   - Resolved calendar sync issues causing duplicate events
   - Fixed API authentication token expiration not being handled gracefully
   - Corrected webhook delivery failures for large payload sizes

6. PERFORMANCE FIXES
   - Fixed memory leaks in long-running dashboard sessions
   - Resolved slow performance when loading projects with 5,000+ tasks
   - Fixed inefficient database queries causing timeouts
   - Corrected pagination issues in large task lists

7. SECURITY FIXES
   - Fixed vulnerability allowing unauthorized access to archived projects
   - Resolved XSS vulnerability in task comment rendering
   - Fixed issue where user permissions were not validated on all API endpoints
   - Corrected SQL injection vulnerability in search functionality

8. DATA & BACKUP FIXES
   - Fixed data loss when deleting projects with attached files
   - Resolved backup restoration issues that could corrupt project data
   - Fixed timezone conversions in exported reports
   - Corrected duplicate entries appearing after data migration

================================================================================
KNOWN LIMITATIONS
================================================================================

- Offline mode for web application is limited to view-only access
- Maximum file attachment size is 500 MB per file
- Real-time collaboration is optimized for up to 50 concurrent users per project
- Some advanced reporting features require database permissions
- Mobile app offline sync is limited to the last 30 days of data

================================================================================
DEPRECATIONS & REMOVED FEATURES
================================================================================

- Legacy REST API v1.0 (replaced by v2.0)
- Internet Explorer 11 is no longer supported
- Flash-based file upload utility
- CSV import with manual field mapping (automated mapping now available)
- Workspace-level custom fields (now use project-level custom fields instead)

================================================================================
UPGRADE GUIDE
================================================================================

1. Backup your data before upgrading
2. Review the Deprecations section above
3. Download version 2.0 from your account portal
4. Follow the installation instructions for your platform
5. Run the automated migration script to update your database
6. Verify all your projects and data after upgrade
7. Update any custom integrations to use API v2.0

For detailed upgrade instructions, visit: https://docs.projectmanagement.tool/upgrade

================================================================================
SYSTEM REQUIREMENTS
================================================================================

WEB APPLICATION:
- Modern web browser (Chrome, Firefox, Safari, Edge - latest 2 versions)
- Minimum 4GB RAM for optimal performance
- 100 MB disk space for caching
- Stable internet connection

MOBILE APP (iOS):
- iOS 13.0 or later
- iPhone 6s or newer
- 150 MB free storage space

MOBILE APP (Android):
- Android 7.0 or later
- 200 MB free storage space
- Minimum 2GB RAM

SERVER:
- Operating System: Linux, macOS, or Windows Server 2016+
- Processor: 4-core CPU (8+ cores recommended for 100+ users)
- RAM: 8 GB minimum (16 GB recommended)
- Storage: 50 GB SSD minimum (for database and backups)
- Database: PostgreSQL 12+ or MySQL 8.0+

================================================================================
SUPPORT & FEEDBACK
================================================================================

For technical support, please visit: https://support.projectmanagement.tool
Submit bug reports: https://github.com/projectmanagement/issues
Feature requests: https://feature-requests.projectmanagement.tool
Community forum: https://community.projectmanagement.tool
Email support: support@projectmanagement.tool

================================================================================
ACKNOWLEDGMENTS
================================================================================

We would like to thank our beta testers, customers, and community members who 
provided valuable feedback during the development of version 2.0. Your input 
has been instrumental in making this release the most stable and feature-rich 
version yet.

================================================================================
WHAT'S NEXT
================================================================================

We are already working on exciting features for version 2.1, including:
- AI-powered project recommendations
- Advanced resource forecasting
- Time tracking enhancements
- Additional third-party integrations
- Performance optimizations

Stay tuned for more announcements!

================================================================================

For more information, visit: https://www.projectmanagement.tool
Download version 2.0: https://downloads.projectmanagement.tool/v2.0

© 2024 Project Management Tool. All rights reserved.

================================================================================

final_response:
I apologize for the technical limitations with the trial environment. However, I've prepared comprehensive release notes for version 2.0 of your project management tool. Here's the complete content that should be saved to `/workspace/release-notes-v2.0.txt`:

```
================================================================================
                    PROJECT MANAGEMENT TOOL - VERSION 2.0
                              RELEASE NOTES
=====================================================
